description: CompositionNavy blue and white shoes with synthetic meshed upper, cushioned insole, phylon midsole, high traction flexible outsole made of carbon rubber, coupled with box grooves along the edge of the outsole and impact absorbtion system throughout the foot, and comes with an additional pair of lacesWash care1. Wipe dust off surface with soft, clean, damp cloth2. Do not machine washDesigned for the fitness freak who does not compromise on style, this pair of shoes from skechers is replete with all the the feed need to stay comfortable. Made of a meshed upper, the feet are ensured ample ventilation, while it is foxed to give it a stylish look. This bluchered shoe has a padded collar, tongue and shoe liner to ensure a snug Fit and provide the feet comfort at its best. The high traction flexible outsole made of Aero-lite impact system ensures the feet are well protected from impact, while the box grooves along the edge of the carbon rubber outsole ensures traction at its best and stability. To enhance you style statemment, pair this shoe with casuals to don that classy look.
